overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game featuring a character exploring an alien planet with dramatic red rock formations and a large pink moon visible in the sky. The character walks from a rocky overlook through a narrow canyon with crystalline red rocks to a cliffside camp, accompanied by a small creature.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: character stops walking to observe the valley vista and distant spire structure

agents.ego_description: walking to the edge of a rocky outcrop and pausing to survey the alien landscape with valley and river below

notable_agents.action: small quadruped creature following closely behind the character

entered.detail: massive pale pink celestial body dominating the sky
tall dark structure rising from the valley floor
silver river winding through the green valley below
weathered rock formation with sparse grass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide rocky overlook with panoramic views of an alien valley. A massive pink planet hangs in the clear sky above a distant spire structure. The character stops to observe the vista while a small creature companion waits nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between ancient tree and red rock formations

events.description: entering narrow passage with smooth red crystalline rock formations

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along a ridge path past a massive gnarled tree toward red rock formations

notable_agents.action: small creature following the character into the narrow passage

entered.detail: massive tree with thick twisted trunk and sprawling branches
smooth wavy red rock formations with crystalline texture

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks along a narrow dirt path past an ancient massive tree. The scene transitions into a narrow passage flanked by smooth red crystalline rock formations that rise on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: exposed ridge trail with red rock outcrops and river views

events.description: exiting the red rock canyon onto an open ridge with expansive river valley views

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow ridge trail with red rock walls on one side and steep drop to river valley on the other

entered.detail: distant mountain with white snow cap visible beyond the ridge
river visible in the valley far below the ridge path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the red rock canyon onto an exposed ridge trail. The path winds along the cliff edge with the red rock formations now on the right and a sweeping view of the winding river valley on the left. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside camp with canvas awning and cooking equipment

events.description: arriving at the cliffside camp with canopy shelter and scattered equipment

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the camp area where an NPC sits by the cooking fire under the canvas awning

notable_agents.action: seated figure tending to cooking equipment under the canvas shelter

entered.detail: makeshift camp built into the rock shelter with various equipment scattered about
large beige canvas stretched overhead for shelter from sun
black metal pot sitting near the fire pit
stacked containers and boxes with gear
spherical woven lanterns suspended from the awning

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a cliffside camp built under a rock overhang with a canvas awning providing shade. An NPC sits by cooking equipment near the edge of the cliff. Supply crates, hanging lanterns, and a metal cooking pot mark this as a temporary shelter overlooking the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide alien vista through a restrictive crystalline canyon and finally to a sheltered cliffside camp. It begins on a rocky overlook where the character and a small creature observe a massive pink planet hanging over a distant spire. As the character turns left, the open landscape narrows into a dirt path past an ancient tree before transitioning into a passage flanked by towering, smooth red crystalline rock formations. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the canyon onto an exposed ridge trail, winding along a cliff edge that reveals a sweeping river valley and distant snow-capped mountains. Finally, the path leads under a rock overhang to a temporary camp equipped with a canvas awning, lanterns, and supply crates where an NPC sits by cooking equipment.
